title: Deprecate node_server.py in favor of RenodeServer
description: NodeServer (node_server.py) uses poll-based RX with 1ms sleep loop. RenodeServer (renode_server.py) has push-based RX. Migrate all usages of NodeServer to RenodeServer, update SimulatorServer.get_node_server_port to spawn RenodeServer instances, then delete node_server.py.
notes: Architecture analysis: NodeServer handles MSG_REGISTER/MSG_RX/MSG_TIME/MSG_CAD for SimRadio clients. RenodeServer uses a simpler per-node protocol (MSG_TX/MSG_RX_ENTER/MSG_RX_EXIT only, fixed node_id). Migration requires either: (1) extending RenodeServer to handle all messages, or (2) changing SimRadio to use per-node connections. This is a design decision, not a drop-in replacement.
